brand.color_scheme: Bright outdoor tones, white text for contrast, large red numbers for the list

prompt: A product photograph of ONE pair of Bandits Matte Black sunglasses from DuberyMNL resting on an outdoor concrete ledge in bright natural sunlight, blurred urban greenery in the background. Real matte sunglasses matching the reference image with natural sunlight on the lens and real shadow on the concrete. On the right side, a numbered feature list with large red numbers: '1 BLOCKS HORIZONTAL GLARE', '2 99.9% UV PROTECTION', '3 REDUCES EYE STRAIN', '4 SHARPER CONTRAST'. All text in the bold italic sporty typeface from the font reference. White headline '4 REASONS TO GO POLARIZED' at top. DuberyMNL logo bottom-right. 4:5 aspect ratio.
